ddls:
CREATE TABLE "terrorist_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the incident */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the incident */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the incident */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the incident took place */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the incident took place */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the incident */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the incident */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the incident */,
  "extended" INTEGER /* Extended information (if any) */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target of the attack */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates if the incident was successful */,
  "suicide" INTEGER /* Indicates if the incident involved a suicide attacker */,
  "attack_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of attack (e.g., Bombing, Assassination) */,
  "target_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of target (e.g., Government, Private Citizens) */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Name of the group responsible for the attack */,
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* Type of weapon used in the attack */,
  "killed" INTEGER /* Number of people killed in the incident */,
  "wounded" INTEGER /* Number of people wounded in the incident */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the incident was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the incident was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the incident */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terrorist_incidents_target_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_type_id") REFERENCES target_types ("target_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terrorist_incidents_attack_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("attack_type_id") REFERENCES attack_types ("attack_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terrorist_incidents_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terrorist_incidents_weapon_id FOREIGN KEY ("weapon_id") REFERENCES weapons ("weapon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the location was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the location */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attack_types" (
  "attack_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attack type */,
  "attack_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the attack type (e.g., Bombing, Assassination) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attack type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the attack type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the attack type was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the attack type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the attack type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attack_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_types" (
  "target_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target type */,
  "target_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the target type (e.g., Government, Private Citizens) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the target type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the target type was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the target type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the target type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the terrorist group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the group was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the group */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapons" (
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weapon type */,
  "weapon_type" TEXT /* Name of the weapon type (e.g., Explosives, Firearms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weapon type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the weapon type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the weapon type was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the weapon type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the weapon type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weapon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casualties" (
  "casualty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each casualty record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related incident */,
  "killed" INTEGER /* Number of people killed */,
  "wounded" INTEGER /* Number of people wounded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the casualty record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the casualty record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the casualty record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the casualty record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("casualty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casualties_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES terrorist_incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, law enforcement, government official) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the incident */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the incident was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES terrorist_incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_locations" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_attack_types" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "attack_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attack type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "attack_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_target_types" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "target_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "target_type_id")
)
